overview.short: Shri Katyayani Baneshwar Temple (Kannada:ಶ್ರೀ ಕಾತ್ಯಾಯಿನಿ ಬಾಣೇಶ್ವರ ದೇವಸ್ತಾನ), (Sanskrit:श्री क़ात्यायनी बाणेश्व् र मन्दिर), or the Aversa Hindu Narayani is a Hindu temple in the coa
overview.description: Shri Katyayani Baneshwar Temple (Kannada:ಶ್ರೀ ಕಾತ್ಯಾಯಿನಿ ಬಾಣೇಶ್ವರ ದೇವಸ್ತಾನ), (Sanskrit:श्री क़ात्यायनी बाणेश्व् र मन्दिर), or the Aversa Hindu Narayani is a Hindu temple in the coastal town of Aversa near Ankola, in the Uttara Kannada district of Karnataka. Shri Katyayani is the Kuladevi (Kuladevata) (family deity) to many Konkani Gaud Saraswat Brahmins, Saraswat Brahmins, Daivajnya Brahmins and Konkani Kharvis. The temple is managed by Shri Katyayani Baneshwar Temple Trust. The temple complex is run on solar energy.

topPlaces.name: Belekeri
topPlaces.description: Belekeri is a village in Ankola, Karnataka, India, and is known for its fish. It is approximately 6 km from Ankola.

topPlaces.name: Keni Port
topPlaces.description: Keni Port is a proposed deep-sea port at Keni village in Uttara Kannada district of Karnataka. The Karnataka Maritime Board signed an agreement with JSW Infrastructure in November 2023 to build the port.

topPlaces.name: Ankola
topPlaces.description: Ankola is a town municipal council and taluka in the Uttara Kannada district of the Indian state of Karnataka. The town is approximately 33 km (21 mi) from district headquarters Karwar.

topPlaces.name: Amadalli
topPlaces.description: Amadalli is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Karwar taluk of Uttara Kannada district in Karnataka.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Shri Katyayani Baneshwar Temple, Aversa?
faq.a: The best time to visit Shri Katyayani Baneshwar Temple, Aversa is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Shri Katyayani Baneshwar Temple, Aversa?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Goa International Airport, Dabolim (88 km) and the nearest railway station is Madgaon Junction (Goa) (70 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Shri Katyayani Baneshwar Temple, Aversa?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Shri Katyayani Baneshwar Temple, Aversa at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Shri Katyayani Baneshwar Temple, Aversa?
faq.a: Stays in Shri Katyayani Baneshwar Temple, Aversa start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Shri Katyayani Baneshwar Temple, Aversa?
faq.a: The top attractions are Belekeri, Keni Port, Ankola, Amadalli.
